title: agrestis rupestris
intro: Agrestis rupestris, also known as the Rock Whitlowgrass, is a species of flowering plant in the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can aid in wound healing and the treatment of infections. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting respiratory health. Agrestis rupestris can be prepared as an infusion or decoction, and is often used in traditional herbal remedies.
